hero.descripcion: I build scalable web products focused on user experience and measurable results.

about.parrafo1Cont: in web development, I specialize in creating digital solutions that combine elegant design with robust functionality.
about.parrafo2: My approach focuses on building products that not only look good, but also offer an exceptional experience and measurable results for users and business.
about.parrafo3Bold: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL, PostgreSQL, interface design, React, Next.js, Node.js, and applied AI in development
about.parrafo3Cont: , plus other technologies as the project requires, prioritizing best practices and solutions aligned with business goals.

projects.masProyectos: These are some personal projects I have built. I have also worked alongside other developers, solving different problems and creating other types of solutions. If you want to know more, contact me.
